mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log (request_id, community_id, operator_id, operator_name, operator_role, operator_ip, operation_type, operation_time, target_type, target_id, before_value, after_value, operation_result, error_message, create_time) VALUES (#{log.requestId}, #{log.communityId}, #{log.operatorId}, #{log.operatorName}, #{log.operatorRole}, #{log.operatorIp}, #{log.operationType}, #{log.operationTime}, #{log.targetType}, #{log.targetId}, #{log.beforeValue}, #{log.afterValue}, #{log.operationResult}, #{log.errorMessage}, NOW())
